reviews.name: places/ChIJ_63X8NR7ykwRkD0TF1PvcHI/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNDd3ByVkVBEAE
reviews.text: Dr. Osgood is an enthusiastic and very capable functional medicine practitioner. I enjoyed my first physical visit very much. He is knowledgeable and very active in the field of functional medicine. He provided me with extensive resources and books to guide me through my program. His team is very professional and they are on top of everything all the time. I went through all the extensive initial testing and I am looking forward to my next appointments. I had also my first telemedicine visit with nutritionist Dr. Chapmon and it went also very well, she is also very competent and professional. I am just beginning my one year program but I have no doubt that I'm going to reach my goals. I fully recommend Grassroots Functional Medicine.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ_63X8NR7ykwRkD0TF1PvcHI/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZeXBQMDhRRRAB
reviews.text: Personalized, holistic, medical care - what more can you ask for?  I was living with intense GI issues for about 8 years before I came to Grassroots.  Dr. Osgood was able to identify the source of the issues (something many doctors had tried and failed to do in the past) and provide me with a unique care plan for addressing the underlying problems.  I have been living pain-free for approx 5 months now :)

reviews.name: places/ChIJ_63X8NR7ykwRkD0TF1PvcHI/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZcXREQnp3RRAB
reviews.text: Dr. Osgood is amazing. While I am not “well” just yet, I am well on my way. He has been the first provider to sit down and take the time to listen to me and my concerns. After 2+ years of medical mysteries, multiple specialists and minimal answers, he is truly a blessing to have found.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ_63X8NR7ykwRkD0TF1PvcHI/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZb1piYldREAE
reviews.text: Dr. Osgood and staff have been a positive and key part of helping me on my way to recover from myositis. I would highly recommend Grassroots if you have a medical problem where the doctors give you medication that blocks your symptoms, and get to the root of healing your body.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ_63X8NR7ykwRkD0TF1PvcHI/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZcXRtdHFRRRAB
reviews.text: Friendly, knowledgeable and professional! Each member of the team cares about your health and giving you the tools to succeed at being healthy and happy.

reviews.name: places/ChIJNRqSQWp5ykwRoUmPxkPRdFY/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tWQlEzQXRZVkJRYlhGMk9YcE5VbnBsTkhkQ00wRRAB
reviews.text: Not impressed at all. Such an expensive place to receive care but they have been negligent with my health at an important time. I know I am super sick and struggling but that is exactly who they are supposed to be helping and supporting. I wouldn’t recommend this place to be honest- for ankylosing spondylitis or for Lyme co-infections. I had horrible reactions to meds and lost 20 lbs in a week and half and they didn’t care or acknowledge it, didn’t follow up, and didn’t respond to me at times when I was in a horrible condition asking what to do. They make you feel seen and heard when you’re there and then often never follow up or care when you say you’re in a health crisis. I could go on but I’m not in the mood.

reviews.name: places/ChIJNRqSQWp5ykwRoUmPxkPRdFY/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNvMFpHeTZ3RRAB
reviews.text:
I’m currently on my health journey at The Stram Integrative Medical Centre, and I can’t thank the team enough for their exceptional care. The doctors take the time to listen and create personalized treatment plans that truly address my needs.

The nursing staff and support team are incredibly compassionate, always making me feel comfortable and supported. I appreciate their comprehensive approach, which integrates various treatments for overall well-being.

Thank you to everyone at The Stram for your dedication and support—I’m grateful to be on this journey with you!

reviews.name: places/ChIJNRqSQWp5ykwRoUmPxkPRdFY/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNUME43cEtnEAE
reviews.text: IM blessed to find a hard chamber and soft chamber company. Love knowing we have a hbot stram center with hard chamber in Vermont with out having to drive 3 hours to Children's hospital of Dartmouth. do have hyperbaric Vermont but love these people too.

reviews.name: places/ChIJNRqSQWp5ykwRoUmPxkPRdFY/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURBb3JDenNRRRAB
reviews.text: Super friendly environment, kind people and medical professionals who will actually listen to you!

reviews.name: places/ChIJR2iv0Kp5ykwRjelzNQo6ZTE/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZZ0o2UzVnRRAB
reviews.text: Dr. Bazel is a thoughtful, well prepared, and kind doctor who puts her patients first.  I've received calls from her after hours when she's reviewing files.  I have always had the sense that I'm getting the best possible care from her as a medical professional.  I am very lucky to have her be part of my medical 'team'.  She's exceptionally skilled with her bedside manner, listens without interruption and is thorough in her exams.  A+

reviews.name: places/ChIJR2iv0Kp5ykwRjelzNQo6ZTE/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURjMXFuSDdRRRAB
reviews.text: Dr. Bazel is a very compassionate and an intelligent diagnostician. In her generously-scheduled office visits she is incredibly thorough and articulate. She makes excellent referrals and is very prompt with follow-ups to tests and other information.  As an aging woman, I am impressed with her knowledge of prescription drugs and vitamin therapy for her senior patients. Her fees are fair and compatible with the service she provides.

reviews.name: places/ChIJR2iv0Kp5ykwRjelzNQo6ZTE/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwNzlleTd3RRAB
reviews.text: Dr. Bazel is incredibly knowledgeable, attentive, approachable, and kind.  She is very thorough and takes her time. There was no sense of being rushed. Additionally her office is very intimate and welcoming.  It is not intimidating like other medical facilities can be.  I felt very comfortable and at ease.  I would very highly recommend Dr. Bazel!

reviews.name: places/ChIJR2iv0Kp5ykwRjelzNQo6ZTE/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQwelBMR3Z3RRAB
reviews.text: I had a last minute immediate need to see a doctor and Dr. Bazel found a way to squeeze me into her schedule.  She took the time to thoroughly evaluate my problem and diagnose the situation so I could get immediate treatment.  She is very kind and thoughtful and I got one on one attention the entire time.  Truly an outstanding physician and a breath of fresh air compared to a typical doctors visit.  I would without hesitation recommend her services as a doctor!

reviews.name: places/ChIJR2iv0Kp5ykwRjelzNQo6ZTE/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURjMXZHbUlBEAE
reviews.text: If you are looking for a MD who cares about you, does incredible follow up, listens to your concerns, explains test results in english, sets up referrals, is warm and professional then I recommend you visit Dr Bazel. You are not a number and you are not rushed.  I leave a message/question and I have a response within 24 hours. I have been a patient for over one year and continue to be amazed at her thoroughness.  I AM NOT LEAVING.
